sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel documentation available for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Dragon Flight
special_mechanics.description: Player controls dragon Amur capable of eight-directional movement throughout vertical scrolling stages

special_mechanics.name: Multi-Head System
special_mechanics.description: Dragon can acquire additional heads up to 3 maximum via blue orb powerups, increasing firepower

special_mechanics.name: Special Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Collectible powerups grant homing shots, multi-shot capability, and size-shrinking for evasion

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources focus on development, regional differences, and hidden features rather than precise physics parameters. No documentation of movement speeds, gravity values, acceleration, or sub-pixel systems found in provided sources. Game is a vertical scrolling shooter with dragon flight mechanics rather than traditional platformer physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Dragon Spirit: The New Legend
